rows.text: Keppel’s Scope 1 and 2 carbon emissions fell by 81.6% in 2024 compared to the 2020 baseline.
rows.source_sentence: Reflecting our commitment to decarbonise our operations, our Scope 1 and 2 carbon emissions have fallen by 81.6% in 2024, compared to our 2020 baseline, and 39.6% year-on-year.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: Keppel contributed more than 1 million tCO2e in avoided emissions through various projects in 2024.
rows.source_sentence: In 2024, we contributed more than 1 million tCO2e in avoided emissions through various Keppel projects, including the waste-to-energy plant that we operate in Qatar, the upgrade of the Keppel Merlimau Cogen Plant in Singapore, the operation of our district cooling systems in Singapore, as well as our Green Mark and LEED-certified projects.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: Keppel achieved zero fatalities across its global operations for the second consecutive year in 2024.
rows.source_sentence: Reflecting our focus on safety, we achieved zero fatalities across our global operations for the second consecutive year in 2024.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: Keppel reduced Scope 1 and 2 carbon emissions by 81.6% from the 2020 baseline.
rows.source_sentence: 81.6% Reduction in Scope 1 and 2 emissions from 2020 baseline achieved by operations in Singapore and overseas.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: Keppel contributed to over 1 million tCO2e in avoided emissions through its waste-to-energy plant in Qatar, the upgrade of the Keppel Merlimau Cogen Plant in Singapore, and district cooling systems in Singapore.
rows.source_sentence: >1m tCO2e In avoided emissions from the waste-to-energy plant operated by Keppel in Qatar, the upgrade of the Keppel Merlimau Cogen Plant in Singapore, our district cooling systems in Singapore, as well as Green Mark or LEED-certified buildings and data centres.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: Keppel achieved a 97% reduction in Scope 1 emissions from the 2020 baseline.
rows.source_sentence: 97% Reduction in Scope 1 emissions from 2020 baseline.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: Keppel committed to halving its Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 2030 compared to 2020 levels and achieving net zero Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 2050.
rows.source_sentence: Committed to halve Keppel’s Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 2030, compared to 2020 levels, and achieve net zero Scope 1 and 2 emissions by 2050.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: Keppel achieved 40.7% of electricity utilisation from renewables in 2024, compared to 23.1% in 2023.
rows.source_sentence: 40.7% Of electricity utilisation from renewables, compared to 23.1% in 2023.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: Keppel aims for 50% of its electricity use to be from renewables by 2025, with a view to reach 100% by 2030.
rows.source_sentence: Aim for 50% of Keppel’s electricity use to be from renewables by 2025, with a view to reach 100% by 2030.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: Keppel achieved a 3% reduction in water withdrawal year-on-year.
rows.source_sentence: 3% Reduction in water withdrawal year-on-year.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: Keppel’s renewables portfolio reached 3.8 GW by the end of 2024, with a target of 7 GW by 2030.
rows.source_sentence: 3.8 GW In renewables portfolio as at end-2024, with target of 7 GW by 2030.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: Keppel conducted quantitative analysis of climate-related transition risks and opportunities, focusing on the impact of higher carbon taxes and electricity prices.
rows.source_sentence: Conducted quantitative analysis of impact of climate-related transition risks and opportunities on Keppel, focusing on impact of higher carbon taxes and higher electricity prices.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: Keppel achieved zero fatalities across its global operations.
rows.source_sentence: Zero Fatalities Across global operations.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: We are committed to diversity, employee well-being, workplace health and safety, and investing in the training and development of our employees to help them reach their full potential.
rows.source_sentence: We are committed to diversity, employee well-being, workplace health and safety, and investing in the training and development of our employees to help them reach their full potential.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: The Board Sustainability and Safety Committee (BSSC) meets at least four times a year.
rows.source_sentence: The BSSC meets at least four times a year.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: The BSSC’s roles include monitoring international sustainability-related trends and developments, reviewing the Company’s sustainability strategy, ensuring that Keppel has in place an effective sustainability governance structure, overseeing the adoption of and progress towards the Company’s sustainability goals, reviewing the processes for identifying, assessing and managing climate-related risks and opportunities, and overseeing the Company’s health, safety, and environmental performance, among others.
rows.source_sentence: Its roles include monitoring international sustainability-related trends and developments, reviewing the Company’s sustainability strategy, ensuring that Keppel has in place an effective sustainability governance structure, overseeing the adoption of and progress towards the Company’s sustainability goals, reviewing the processes for identifying, assessing and managing climate-related risks and opportunities, and overseeing the Company’s health, safety, and environmental performance, among others.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: The BSSC also makes regular visits to Keppel’s projects and work sites, including interacting with our contractors and suppliers, to monitor and better understand Keppel’s sustainability and safety performance.
rows.source_sentence: The BSSC also makes regular visits to Keppel’s projects and work sites, including interacting with our contractors and suppliers, to monitor and better understand Keppel’s sustainability and safety performance.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: Environmental sustainability targets, including carbon emissions reduction, accounted for 5% of the Company’s performance scorecard.
rows.source_sentence: Environmental sustainability targets, including carbon emissions reduction, accounted for 5% of the Company’s performance scorecard.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: The Workplace Safety and Health (WSH) Council builds industry capabilities to better manage WSH and promote safety and health at work.
rows.source_sentence: • Workplace Safety and Health (WSH) Council to build industry capabilities to better manage WSH and promote safety and health at work;
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: The Singapore Low Carbon Network, an initiative by PwC Singapore, builds capacity and shares knowledge to achieve a low carbon Singapore.
rows.source_sentence: • Singapore Low Carbon Network, an initiative by PwC Singapore to build capacity and share knowledge to achieve a low carbon Singapore.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: Keppel engages suppliers on ESG issues, including health and safety, and carbon management through training.
rows.source_sentence: training for suppliers on ESG issues, including health and safety, and carbon management.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: Keppel’s material ESG factors include Climate Action and Environmental Management, Corporate Governance and Risk Management, Supply Chain Management, Human Capital Management, Health and Safety, and Contribution to Society.
rows.source_sentence: The six material ESG factors, namely, Climate Change and Environmental Management, Corporate Governance and Risk Management, Supply Chain Management, Human Capital Management, Health and Safety, as well as Contribution to Society, were grouped under the three pillars of Environmental Stewardship, Responsible Business, as well as People and Community, which correspond with the environmental, governance and social aspects of sustainability respectively.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: Keppel’s operations emit greenhouse gases that contribute to climate change, but it also provides solutions that contribute to decarbonisation.
rows.source_sentence: Keppel’s operations emit greenhouse gases that contribute to climate change. At the same time, Keppel provides diverse solutions that contribute to decarbonisation and help our customers and communities reduce or avoid carbon emissions.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: Keppel has committed to reduce Scope 1 and 2 emissions and is tracking and reporting on all relevant categories of Scope 3 emissions.
rows.source_sentence: Keppel has committed to reduce Scope 1 and 2 emissions, and is also tracking and reporting on all relevant categories of Scope 3 emissions.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: Keppel’s Scope 1 and 2 emissions fell by 81.6% in 2024 compared to the 2020 baseline.
rows.source_sentence: Keppel’s Scope 1 and 2 emissions fell by 81.6% in 2024 compared to our 2020 baseline, and 39.6% year-on-year.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: Keppel’s Zero Fatality Strategy and HSE training for contractors and their employees aim to raise industry HSE standards and strengthen safety culture.
rows.source_sentence: Keppel has put in place a Zero Fatality Strategy, and provides HSE training for contractors and their employees at its Safety Awareness Centres in Singapore and overseas, which help to raise industry HSE standards, eliminate or reduce risks at work and strengthen safety culture across our supply chain.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: Keppel’s HSE training and initiatives contributed to improved safety awareness and performance among contractors and their employees.
rows.source_sentence: The HSE training and other initiatives contributed to improved safety awareness and performance among contractors and their employees, who were trained on topics such as working at height, lifting procedures, working within confined spaces, proper use of equipment and scaffold erection.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: The number of fatalities for contractors’ workforce improved from two in 2022 to zero in 2023 and 2024.
rows.source_sentence: The number of fatalities for contractors’ workforce improved from two in 2022 to zero in 2023 and 2024.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: Physical risks can lead to higher operating costs, business disruptions and potentially stranded assets, while transition risks such as policy and regulations, legal, technological, reputational and market changes may pose financial and operational risks.
rows.source_sentence: Physical risks can lead to higher operating costs, business disruptions and potentially stranded assets, while transition risks such as policy and regulations, legal, technological, reputational and market changes may pose financial and operational risks.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: We also minimise our impact on the environment by reducing carbon emissions, energy consumption, water consumption and waste generation, avoiding pollution and preserving biodiversity in our operations.
rows.source_sentence: We also minimise our impact on the environment by reducing carbon emissions, energy consumption, water consumption and waste generation, avoiding pollution and preserving biodiversity in our operations.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: We also collaborate with UN Global Compact Network Singapore to provide carbon management training for our suppliers, especially those from small- and medium-sized enterprises, to enhance sustainability performance within our supply chain.
rows.source_sentence: We also collaborate with UN Global Compact Network Singapore to provide carbon management training for our suppliers, especially those from small- and medium-sized enterprises, to enhance sustainability performance within our supply chain.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: Keppel’s operations involve exposure to health and safety risks.
rows.source_sentence: Keppel’s operations involve exposure to health and safety risks.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: HSE risk has been identified as one of the key non-financial risks which is monitored by the Board Risk Committee under Keppel’s Enterprise Risk Management Framework, so as to prevent any safety breaches or lapses in all sites where Keppel operates that could result in direct or indirect impact on our internal and external stakeholders, including our employees, contractors, suppliers and customers.
rows.source_sentence: HSE risk has been identified as one of the key non-financial risks which is monitored by the Board Risk Committee under Keppel’s Enterprise Risk Management Framework, so as to prevent any safety breaches or lapses in all sites where Keppel operates that could result in direct or indirect impact on our internal and external stakeholders, including our employees, contractors, suppliers and customers.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: Keppel is committed to providing a safe and healthy working environment, building a proactive safety culture, and continually improving HSE standards both in our operations and the broader community.
rows.source_sentence: Keppel is committed to providing a safe and healthy working environment, building a proactive safety culture, and continually improving HSE standards both in our operations and the broader community.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: The Company’s leadership sets the tone and leads by example in strengthening our safety culture.
rows.source_sentence: The Company’s leadership sets the tone and leads by example in strengthening our safety culture.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: We ensure high safety standards for our products and services to safeguard customer health and safety.
rows.source_sentence: We ensure high safety standards for our products and services to safeguard customer health and safety.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: This includes applying Design for Safety guidelines to all major development projects in Singapore and overseas to ensure that work can be executed safely not only during the construction stage, but also during the operations and maintenance stages.
rows.source_sentence: This includes applying Design for Safety guidelines to all major development projects in Singapore and overseas to ensure that work can be executed safely not only during the construction stage, but also during the operations and maintenance stages.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: The Board Sustainability and Safety Committee (BSSC) provides greater focus on sustainability matters, including reviewing the processes for identifying, assessing, and managing climate-related risks and opportunities across the four pillars of governance, strategy, risk management, and metrics and targets, as well as related reporting.
rows.source_sentence: The Board Sustainability and Safety Committee (BSSC) provides greater focus on sustainability matters, including reviewing the processes for identifying, assessing, and managing climate-related risks and opportunities across the four pillars of governance, strategy, risk management, and metrics and targets, as well as related reporting.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: The company likely addresses air quality through its focus on renewable energy, hydrogen-compatible power plants, and decarbonisation initiatives, which inherently reduce NOx, SOx, and particulate emissions.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report

rows.text: The company likely enhances grid resiliency through investments in renewable energy infrastructure, energy-as-a-service solutions, and sustainable urban renewal projects aimed at improving supply security and reliability.
rows.source_doc: keppel ltd sustainability report 2024 full report
